items.name: Saramada Cubing Bangladesh 2023

venue.name: [CubeNation HQ] (https://www.facebook.com/cubenationbd/)
venue.address: CubeNation, House #91-93, Road #W2 ,Block-C, Eastern Housing, Pallabi, Dhaka 1216

items.information:
1. Competitors and guests MUST NOT attend this competition if they have any COVID-19 symptoms or have been in contact with someone who is COVID-19 positive.
2. Please be aware that there are qualification criteria in place for participating in this competition. 
3. All the necessary information is given the Tabs, please have a look.
4. Please follow the [Saramada Cubing Bangladesh 2023 ](http://facebook.com/SCBd23), all the updates will be posted there.
